findings.description: Section s1 is titled "HTML4.01との相違点" but its content covers three distinct source sections: 目的 (Purpose), 仕様 (Specifications), and HTML4.01との相違点. The title misrepresents the full scope of the section.
findings.source_evidence: Source has three separate h2/h3 headings: 目的 (====), 仕様 (====), HTML4.01との相違点 (------). All three are merged into s1 which is titled only "HTML4.01との相違点".

findings.description: The knowledge file omits the note that no configuration change is needed at project start when using default settings. This is decision-relevant for developers evaluating whether customization is required.
findings.source_evidence: Source states: "デフォルトの設定をそのまま使用する場合、プロジェクト開始時に下記に述べる設定変更を行う必要はない。" (If using default settings, no configuration changes described below are needed at project start.)

findings.description: The specific error message produced when JavaScript contains consecutive hyphens is omitted. This message helps developers diagnose the failure when they encounter it.
findings.source_evidence: Source tip block contains the error message: "Lexical error at line 965, column 31.  Encountered: \"-\" (45), after : \"--\""
